title: STRBEFORE does not return language tag
description:
Query:
SELECT (STRBEFORE(?S, " string") AS ?B) WHERE
{
    BIND("test string"@en AS ?S)
}

Result:
test

But the correct result should be "test"@en
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_strings (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, lang_string TEXT);
INSERT INTO test_strings (id, lang_string) VALUES (DEFAULT, 'example string'::text);
INSERT INTO test_strings (id, lang_string) VALUES (DEFAULT, 'test string'::text);
SELECT (substring(lang_string from '^(.*?)( string)') || lang_string::text) AS result FROM test_strings WHERE id = 1;
SELECT (substring(lang_string from '^(.*?)( string)') || lang_string::text) AS result FROM test_strings WHERE id = 2;
